hdaedccfagea8ag46c8g8246gb785d4a33d72: *In your dream, you stand over yourself as you sleep. A knife in your hand, murder in your heart.*
he69d05c0g6be7g4cd0ga544ge64613572961: *You are ready to strike, to end your own life - but then a shock runs through your mind. This is no dream.*
he46a7edcg1c91g4297g93feg9e86c8cbcce1: I had hoped you would sleep through this.
h59b22d91g551cg4ad2g986bg190e17d888d3: I take no pleasure in what I must do. In another life, I would have taken you as my consort in Menzoberranzan.
h6e9af58bg43aag42dbg8428g0ffa3748a0a4: But the Absolute demands your death.
h166f6cb4g3742g44e1gbadagb72616dfc7e9: You can resist. Fight against the Absolute.
h7d3dd0d8g6ad1g4359g824fg93f1d25054d7: I wish that were true. Come - let us test each other one last time.
h90caf7d4g05d4g4244ga4ddg7ec5ef9939ab: The Absolute still needs me - you still need me.
h72275faeg66d0g48d2gbd2cge4bf008a702c: Killing you would be... bitter. I have never needed anyone. But I want you.
h121f6528g1a5dg455bg86edg636689b36c38: I give you your life, on the understanding that you belong to me now. And I to you.
h7b64acedga3d9g452egb293gebb8897d2a83: If we serve Her well, the Absolute will bring us together again. But for now we must part.
hcb722d2fg3302g4f5bgb657g47b368103d07: I still have business here, but your path leads to Moonrise - the heart of the Absolute's power.
h52e39547g4f89g462eg8452gfa78a2ade50e: To gather our forces in this region. They're ill-disciplined - without a strong hand, they'll disperse.
h8abbf28egd9bdg4f07gaadfgc11bb2515dc5: The heart of power - what is this Moonrise, exactly?
hdb655883g3450g4737ga5f6g10c84eb52bbe: The Absolute has spoken to you already, in whispers, but at Moonrise you will be in Her presence.
h3c205836g75f9g4739gb962gfc3d3a8f8853: She will test you. If you fail, you will break; if your faith is strong, you will become something even more beautiful.
h963ea7adgc37cg4185g9455g307c6332d759: I'm ready. How do I get there?
h8c1dd2d7g084eg411dgbd75g15ea9b03d99a: With difficulty - but I can help.
h40edd1fbgb437g4e9cgbf3dg28eb0d041e6b: The land around Moonrise is cursed. Travelling there will sap your strength and your sanity.
hcd8b76b6g2d30g4c83gb900gb45e1e6c8419: But I can protect you. There is an artefact with the power to negate the curse.
h63a98a17g7910g4eaegafbbg2067e16084bc: A wretched creature in my service holds that artefact. He will be your guide.
h25a2ac0dg794dg4859g8152g36d0887d057b: He was a drow once. Now he is an abomination, a victim of Lolth's cruelty.
hcadc7fbcg4be1g4c70g9577ge06bdbefc9fd: He will wait for you at the mountain pass. I warn you - he is quite mad, but he knows the path to Moonrise better than anyone.
hb986d239g462cg496cga4d0ge76b82e3e775: Go to him when you are ready. And do not return to the goblin camp - as far as they know, you were destined to die tonight.
h9c60c784g2465g418aga39eg902a0f79a1a5: I'm not sure I'm ready for this.
h5f8e90b0gecc8g4ff3gb580g7a7caef3a3ac: Then steel yourself. If you are uncertain, you will not even survive the journey.
hf0282d78gd26ag4a77g8e52gc849ae629e63: She will test you. If you fail, you will break; if your faith is strong, you will become something greater than yourself.
h375015a7gde3cg4a88ga315gfe377acc674a: Wrong. The Absolute brought you to me, and now She will take you into Her presence at Moonrise.
h35793047g743cg4739g858bg3a8f35f22e47: I do prefer you alive. You have much to learn, but you have been useful.
h751f8f5fg5053g4f60gbc51gcd38c5b7171c: I suppose it is not for me to judge, but for the Absolute. You must go to Moonrise Towers. There, you will either prove yourself, or die.
hccfe830cg5d9dg4549gba70g997eb074c47e: The Absolute still needs me - you still need me.
h4233997bga8cfg47d7g8e85g08b8e420a78f: Open your mind - show her the power within you.
h3d47d2ccga768g4c7aga76ag2b94acbc6576: Do I mean nothing to you?
h9210cd61g1615g44b8gb61bgb5e202f56c1d: There is a fragment of you that will live in my mind forever. But you will die tonight.
hb01f0ceag75f2g4332ga082g97efa6878aed: True. And you played your part well - but now it is done.
h9cdfe01fgaaa3g4ee4g80acg0e2b9671215e: Good - you are awake. I want to taste your fear, just as you tasted mine.
ha53b5908g0933g4f47g997bg634f7c5daff8: You wouldn't dare kill me - I'm a True Soul, same as you.
h13527206g19d8g4ea6gbeeag3cc5cb403366: That might be. But you have not been truly tested yet.
hc1468c62gbb61g4582g8423g324e9179e80a: You've played your part. The glory for this victory will be mine alone.
hbfe0b4c2g5a4ag44a1g9d04g93e0521e78e5: Good - you are awake. I want to taste your fear.
